title: Vitax Organic Liquid Seaweed Fertilizer – All-Natural Concentrated Plant Nutrient for Flowers, Vegetables, Shrubs & Trees – Boosts Growth, Resilience & Yields (500ml)
features: All-Natural Formula: Made from 100% organic liquid seaweed extract, free from synthetic chemicals, ensuring a safe and eco-friendly solution for your garden.
Versatile Application: Suitable for flowers, vegetables, fruit crops, shrubs, and trees; can be used as a root drench or foliar spray.
Promotes Plant Health: Enhances plant resilience to environmental stress, pests, and diseases, ensuring healthier, more robust growth.
Boosts Yields: Encourages bigger, tastier fruit and vegetable harvests with consistent use throughout the growing season.
Easy to Use: Simple to dilute with water and apply using a watering can, fine sprayer, or hose-end dilutor.
description: Product description Boost your garden's vitality with our Organic Liquid Seaweed Fertilizer, a natural and concentrated solution designed to promote healthy growth for flowers, vegetables, shrubs, and trees. Packed with organic nutrients, this versatile formula strengthens plants, making them more resilient to environmental stress, pests, and diseases. Perfect for both root drenching and foliar spraying, it encourages bigger, tastier harvests and lush, vibrant blooms. Ideal for all-purpose use, this eco-friendly seaweed extract is an essential addition to your gardening routine, ensuring healthier, thriving plants year-round. Available in 500ml, 1L, Ingredients Aqueous seaweed extract. Directions To use Organic Liquid Seaweed Fertilizer, shake the bottle well and dilute 1 capful in water—8 liters for propagation and transplanting or 4 liters for mature plants and fruiting crops. Apply using a watering can, fine sprayer, or hose-end dilutor. For propagation, use as a root drench during watering or soak the rootball before planting. For mature plants, apply every 7–10 days throughout the growing season, ensuring leaves are thoroughly wetted for foliar spraying. When using on fruit crops like tomatoes, spray before and during flowering to enhance fruit set. For best results, avoid application in direct sunlight or during high heat; early morning or late evening is ideal. Regular, consistent use provides the healthiest growth and yields. Safety Warning When using Vitax Seaweed Feed, always wear gloves to protect your skin from irritation. It is important to follow the recommended application rates to avoid over-fertilizing, which can damage the plant. Any spillages on paths or paving should be brushed off immediately to prevent staining or accidental ingestion by children or pets. Store the feed in a secure location, away from children, pets, and foodstuffs, to avoid any risk of consumption. After use, wash your hands and any exposed skin thoroughly. Children and pets can safely re-enter the garden once the feed has been incorporated into the soil. See more
